name: workflow-framework
description: File-based development workflow system for Claude Code — roadmaps, milestones, and task contracts
author: tronbonjovi

skills.name: draft
skills.description: Use when you have a quick idea, thought, or rough plan to capture — saves it to .claude/roadmap/drafts/ with minimal ceremony

skills.name: build-roadmap
skills.description: Use when you have brainstorm drafts or informal plans and want to formalize them into a structured roadmap with milestones and AI-executable task contracts

skills.name: adopt-project
skills.description: Use when bringing an existing, in-progress project into the workflow-framework system — scans the repo, identifies planning artifacts, then bootstraps the workflow structure

skills.name: setup-roadmap
skills.description: Use when starting a new project's workflow tracking or when a project needs the roadmap directory structure initialized

skills.name: update-roadmap
skills.description: Use when adding, removing, or modifying milestones and tasks in an existing roadmap

skills.name: update-task
skills.description: Internal plumbing for cascade status updates — not user-invoked

skills.name: work-task
skills.description: Use when the user wants to work on tasks, check project status, or continue development

skills.name: status
skills.description: Use when the user wants to check project status, see roadmap progress, or get an overview of milestones and tasks — reads roadmap files and prints a formatted terminal summary
